name: Scrambled Eggs with Toast
description: Classic breakfast with fluffy scrambled eggs
instructions: 1. Beat eggs with salt and pepper. 2. Melt butter in pan. 3. Scramble eggs until fluffy. 4. Toast bread. 5. Serve together.

name: Oatmeal with Berries and Almonds
description: Hearty oatmeal topped with fresh berries
instructions: 1. Cook oats in milk until thick. 2. Top with berries, almonds, and honey.

name: Greek Yogurt Breakfast Bowl
instructions: 1. Place yogurt in bowl. 2. Top with granola, berries, and walnuts. 3. Drizzle with honey.

name: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
instructions: 1. Toast bread. 2. Mash avocado with salt. 3. Poach egg. 4. Spread avocado on toast, top with egg.

name: Banana Pancakes
instructions: 1. Mix flour, eggs, milk. 2. Slice banana, fold into batter. 3. Cook pancakes in butter. 4. Serve with syrup.

name: Hearty Granola Bowl with Nuts
description: Dense granola bowl with mixed nuts and honey
instructions: 1. Pour granola into bowl. 2. Add Greek yogurt. 3. Top with mixed nuts and honey drizzle.

name: Full English Omelette with Toast
description: Large omelette with cheese and buttered toast
instructions: 1. Beat eggs. 2. Cook omelette with cheese. 3. Butter toast. 4. Serve together.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Oatmeal
description: Creamy oatmeal with peanut butter and sliced banana
instructions: 1. Cook oats with milk. 2. Stir in peanut butter. 3. Top with sliced banana and honey.

name: Avocado Egg Toast with Seeds
description: Thick avocado toast with eggs and seed topping
instructions: 1. Toast bread. 2. Mash avocado on toast. 3. Fry eggs. 4. Top with seeds.

name: Breakfast Burrito Grande
description: Large breakfast burrito with eggs, cheese and beans
instructions: 1. Scramble eggs. 2. Warm tortilla. 3. Fill with eggs, beans, cheese. 4. Roll and serve.

name: Double Pancakes with Maple Syrup
description: Stack of thick pancakes with butter and maple syrup
instructions: 1. Mix flour, eggs, milk. 2. Cook pancakes. 3. Stack and top with butter and syrup.

name: Beef Steak with Mashed Potatoes
description: Grilled beef steak with creamy mashed potatoes
instructions: 1. Season and grill steak. 2. Boil and mash potatoes with butter and cream. 3. Serve together.

name: Chicken Thighs with Rice and Vegetables
description: Roasted chicken thighs with rice and steamed vegetables
instructions: 1. Season and roast chicken thighs. 2. Cook rice. 3. Steam broccoli. 4. Serve together.

name: Hearty Pasta Bolognese
description: Rich meat sauce over a generous portion of pasta
instructions: 1. Brown ground beef. 2. Add tomato sauce and simmer. 3. Cook pasta. 4. Combine and top with cheese.

name: Salmon with Quinoa and Avocado
description: Grilled salmon fillet with quinoa and avocado salad
instructions: 1. Grill salmon. 2. Cook quinoa. 3. Dice avocado. 4. Combine and drizzle with olive oil.

name: Lamb Chops with Couscous
description: Grilled lamb chops with herbed couscous
instructions: 1. Season and grill lamb chops. 2. Cook couscous. 3. Mix couscous with herbs and olive oil. 4. Serve together.

name: Double Chicken Breast with Pasta
description: Two chicken breasts with creamy pasta
instructions: 1. Grill chicken breasts. 2. Cook pasta. 3. Make cream sauce with cheese. 4. Combine.

name: Ground Beef Rice Bowl
description: Seasoned ground beef over rice with vegetables
instructions: 1. Brown ground beef with spices. 2. Cook rice. 3. Saute vegetables. 4. Assemble bowl.

name: Double Turkey Club Sandwich
description: Loaded double-decker turkey sandwich with cheese and avocado
instructions: 1. Toast bread. 2. Layer turkey, cheese, avocado, lettuce. 3. Stack and serve.

name: Chicken Caesar Wrap
description: Large wrap with grilled chicken and Caesar dressing
instructions: 1. Grill and slice chicken. 2. Fill tortilla with chicken, lettuce, cheese. 3. Roll and serve.

name: Tuna Melt on Sourdough
instructions: 1. Mix tuna with mayo. 2. Spread on bread. 3. Top with cheese. 4. Broil until melted.

name: Ham and Cheese Quesadilla
description: Crispy quesadilla with ham, cheese and avocado
instructions: 1. Fill tortilla with ham, cheese. 2. Cook until crispy. 3. Serve with avocado.

name: Egg Salad Sandwich with Nuts
description: Rich egg salad on thick bread with a side of nuts
instructions: 1. Boil and chop eggs. 2. Mix with mayo. 3. Spread on bread. 4. Serve with nuts on the side.

name: Chicken Avocado Bowl with Rice
description: Grilled chicken with avocado, rice and beans
instructions: 1. Grill chicken. 2. Cook rice. 3. Assemble bowl with avocado and beans.

name: Trail Mix with Yogurt
description: Greek yogurt with nuts and dried fruit
instructions: 1. Pour yogurt in bowl. 2. Top with mixed nuts and dried cranberries.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Toast
description: Thick toast with peanut butter and banana slices
instructions: 1. Toast bread. 2. Spread peanut butter. 3. Top with banana slices.

name: Cottage Cheese with Seeds and Honey
description: Protein-rich cottage cheese with seeds and honey
instructions: 1. Scoop cottage cheese into bowl. 2. Top with seeds and drizzle honey.

name: Almond Butter Rice Cake Stack
description: Rice cakes with almond butter and banana
instructions: 1. Spread almond butter on rice cakes. 2. Top with banana slices and chia seeds.

name: Chocolate Nut Bark
description: Dark chocolate studded with mixed nuts
instructions: 1. Melt chocolate. 2. Spread on tray and sprinkle nuts. 3. Chill and break into pieces.

name: Banana Peanut Butter Smoothie Bowl
description: Thick smoothie bowl with banana and peanut butter
instructions: 1. Blend banana with yogurt and peanut butter. 2. Pour into bowl. 3. Top with granola.

name: Dates with Cream Cheese and Walnuts
description: Stuffed dates with cream cheese and walnuts
instructions: 1. Pit dates. 2. Fill with cream cheese. 3. Top with walnut halves.

name: Chocolate Avocado Mousse
description: Rich chocolate mousse made with avocado
instructions: 1. Blend avocado with cocoa and honey. 2. Chill. 3. Serve with whipped cream.
